hustleItem.title: Hustle Item
hustleItem.description: Represents a saved credential index (password/login record) or secret notes

title.description: Title/service of the credential (e.g. github, Gmail)

username.description: Username or login email associated with the credential

websiteUrl.description: Optional direct URL to the login page of the service

updatedAt.description: Last updated timestamp in ISO-8601 format

userId.description: The UID of the user owner of this credential

hashRecord.title: Hash Record
hashRecord.description: Represents a saved hash creation history item

id.description: Unique identifier of the hash record

text.description: The plain text used to generate the hash

userId.description: The UID of the user owner of this hash record

/hustleItems/{itemId}.description: Collection of passwords and logins managed by individual users

/hashRecords/{recordId}.description: Collection of user-created hash values in their history
